response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment (00:00-00:51) and resolved the song 'Fashion Beat' by Sakura Miko. 2. Performed a search for 'ファッションビート さくらみこ 歌詞' and found the full lyrics. 3. Mapped the subsequent segments to their respective announcements (merch, book, figure, shop) and determined they do not contain vocal music. 4. Translated the lyrics into English.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of Sakura Miko's song 'Fashion Beat', followed by a series of announcements regarding her 2026 birthday merchandise, a new picture book, a new figure, and a pop-up shop.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Fashion Beat' by Sakura Miko.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even if it hurts and I cover my eyes
I can still hear the anxiety show
Because worrying won't change anything
Guess I have no choice but to do it
If I'm going to break, I'd rather it be easy to fix
What kind of shape can I aim for?

A jump without a running start
A dive without a safety rope
I want to praise myself today, don't I?
I want to breathe, I want to resonate more
Hey, I might be able to see something beyond myself
My delusions won't stop
Want to try sniffing out this Fashion Beat?
I can't just spit out 'whatever' at my dreams
Is it me who will make them come true?
Or should I leave it to someone else?
I just, I just want to win against myself

New Fashion Beat, eating up love
I refuse to lose, it tastes like nothing
Evolution that turns to ash, again and again
Personification of a bug that is reborn
Still, I won't let myself rot yet
That's right, I won't

The things that sting and prick
I'm tired of them
Sorry, this annoying wordplay
Please, just put it away properly
I am my own rival, a natural interpretation
I know what I should do, but

A jump without a running start
A dive without a safety rope
I feel like I can't do it today
Isn't it impossible to 'not care'?
Hey, even if I compare myself to others
Isn't it just boring?

Want to try sniffing out this Fashion Beat?
I can't just spit out 'whatever' at my dreams
Is it me who will make them come true?
Or should I leave it to someone else?
I just, I just want to win against myself

I refuse to lose, it tastes like nothing

Still, I won't let myself rot yet
That's right, I won't

I cannot stop

Still, I won't let myself wither yet
That's right, I won't

scenes.description: Announcement regarding Sakura Miko's 2026 birthday merchandise.
Announcement regarding the new picture book 'Mikopee and the Big Cherry Tree'.
Announcement regarding the new Sakura Miko figure.
Announcement regarding the pop-up shop in Kyoto.
